name: MultiSafepay Dutch Payment Gateway REST API
what_it_does: MultiSafepay Dutch payment gateway REST API for Dutch and European merchants to accept online payments through 200+ payment methods including iDEAL, Klarna, credit cards, SEPA, PayPal, and local European methods — enabling automated payment acceptance, settlement, refunds, and fraud prevention through MultiSafepay's licensed European payment processing platform serving 18,000+ merchants. Enables AI agents to manage payment order for Dutch/European checkout automation, handle iDEAL for Netherlands bank transfer payment automation, access Klarna for BNPL invoice and installment automation, retrieve SEPA for European bank transfer automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle fraud detection for transaction risk scoring automation, access settlement for merchant daily payment reconciliation automation, retrieve webhook for payment status notification automation, manage subscription for recurring payment automation, and integrate MultiSafepay with Dutch e-commerce platforms (WooCommerce, Magento, PrestaShop) for European payment gateway automation.
use_cases: Accepting iDEAL, Klarna, and credit card payments for Dutch e-commerce merchant automation agents
Integrating 200+ European payment methods for multi-country EU merchant checkout automation agents
Managing subscription billing and recurring payments for Dutch SaaS and membership platform automation agents
Accessing payment analytics and settlement reports for European merchant financial reconciliation automation agents
not_for: Non-European merchants without EU operations (MultiSafepay focuses on Netherlands and European markets)
High-volume enterprise card processing without European operations (MultiSafepay is mid-market focused)
Crypto or alternative asset payments (MultiSafepay is traditional payment methods)
best_when: A Dutch or European merchant wanting AI agents to accept 200+ payment methods including iDEAL, Klarna, SEPA, and credit cards through MultiSafepay's licensed European payment gateway serving 18,000+ merchants.
avoid_when: DUTCH/EU FOCUS: MultiSafepay primarily serves Netherlands and European Union merchants; automated global coverage assumption creates payment_method_not_available for non-EU markets; automated must verify market availability for specific countries. DNB AND FCA LICENSED: MultiSafepay is licensed by Dutch National Bank (DNB) and FCA; automated unlicensed payment assumption creates requires_licensed_processor; automated must verify MultiSafepay's license coverage for specific payment types. IDEAL REDIRECT IS MANDATORY: iDEAL payments require consumer redirect to their Dutch bank's internet banking; automated server-side iDEAL assumption creates iDEAL_redirect_required; automated must implement consumer redirect for iDEAL payment flow. WEBHOOK IS REQUIRED FOR PAYMENT STATUS: MultiSafepay delivers payment status via webhook, not synchronous response; automated synchronous payment confirmation assumption creates order_processing_before_payment_confirmed; automated must implement webhook handler for payment status updates.

auth.notes: MultiSafepay uses API key for payment REST API authentication. REST API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 1994. Products: Payment gateway, iDEAL, Klarna, PayPal, SEPA, subscriptions, fraud prevention, analytics. SDKs: PHP, Python, JS, Java, C#. DNB and FCA licensed. PSD2 compliant. 200+ payment methods. 18,000+ merchants. Acquired by Crédit Mutuel Arkéa group.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test account for development; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fees by payment method; monthly account fees; no setup fee for standard account
pricing.notes: Amsterdam NL. Crédit Mutuel Arkéa. Per-transaction. 18,000+ merchants. DNB/FCA licensed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment creation and status APIs throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: PAYMENT STATUS IS ASYNC VIA WEBHOOK: MultiSafepay payment confirmation comes via webhook, not synchronous response; automated synchronous order confirmation assumption creates premature_order_processing; automated must register webhook URL and process payment status notifications

GATEWAY ID REQUIRED: Each MultiSafepay payment requires specific gateway ID (IDEAL, KLARNA, VISA, etc.); automated generic payment assumption creates invalid_gateway for unspecified payment method; automated must specify correct MultiSafepay gateway ID for each payment type

IDEAL ISSUER LIST MUST BE FETCHED: iDEAL requires fetching current list of participating Dutch banks; automated hardcoded bank list assumption creates missing_issuers for new banks; automated must fetch issuer list from MultiSafepay API at checkout

KLARNA REQUIRES CUSTOMER DATA: Klarna BNPL requires full customer and order data for credit assessment; automated minimal-data Klarna assumption creates klarna_assessment_failed; automated must provide complete customer address, date of birth, and order details

REFUND TIMING HAS LIMITS: MultiSafepay refunds are possible within specific timeframes per payment method; automated unlimited refund window assumption creates refund_window_exceeded for old transactions; automated must check payment method refund policies
agent_readiness.security_notes: Dutch payment gateway. PSD2, GDPR, PCI-DSS, DNB/FCA. API key. EU/NL. Payment and cardholder data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Payment gateway. PSD2, GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. EU/NL. Card and payment transaction data.
